message:
test(readme): cover assign / apply_fn / applymap_na_action / apply_rows (fd90.275 / br-jhjdn)

Extends readme_apply_and_transform_compiles_and_runs to cover 4
DataFrame apply/assign variants that previously had no integration
coverage:

- DataFrame.assign(Vec<(name, Column)>) — bulk column-add (line 18794)
- DataFrame.apply_fn(Fn(&[Scalar]) -> Scalar, axis=0) — column-wise
  reduction with axis arg (line 22825)
- DataFrame.applymap_na_action(closure) — applymap with NaN
  pass-through (line 19586)
- DataFrame.apply_rows(closure, name) — row-iter returning a named
  Series (line 23939)

Verified: 36 integration tests + 7 lib tests + 2 doctests pass.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

 {"id":"frankenpandas-jed","title":"Add DataFrame.asof conformance test coverage","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-04-17T08:03:41.861274332Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-04-17T08:07:43.311886401Z","closed_at":"2026-04-17T08:07:43.309544189Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0}
 {"id":"frankenpandas-jff4r","title":"fd90.175: README df.dtypes() wrong return type + missing ?","description":"fd90.74-174 README audit. Line 1147 in DataFrame Introspection shows:

  let dtypes = df.dtypes();            // Vec<(column_name, DType)>

But crates/fp-frame/src/lib.rs:16158 declares:
  pub fn dtypes(&self) -> Result<Series, FrameError>

Two errors:
1. Return type comment wrong: actual is Series, not Vec<(String, DType)>
2. Missing question-mark on the call — without it, `dtypes` is bound to a Result, not the unwrapped Series.

A user copying this hits an immediate compile error if they use `dtypes` in a context expecting Vec or Series.

Fix: add the question-mark and update the comment to "Series indexed by column name with DType values". Pure README change.","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"bug","created_at":"2026-04-26T17:17:47.179344689Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-04-26T17:19:19.422776522Z","closed_at":"2026-04-26T17:19:19.419937997Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0}
+{"id":"frankenpandas-jhjdn","title":"fd90.275: Cover DataFrame.assign + apply_fn + applymap_na_action + apply_rows","description":"fd90.275: Cover DataFrame.assign / apply_fn / applymap_na_action / apply_rows + Series.combine / apply_fn.

Six apply/assign variants uncovered:
- DataFrame.assign(Vec<(name, Column)>) (line 18794) — bulk column-add
- DataFrame.apply_fn(func, axis) (line 22825)
- DataFrame.applymap_na_action(func) (line 19586) — applymap with na pass-through
- DataFrame.apply_rows(func, name) (line 23939) — row-iter with named output Series
- Series.combine(other, func) (line 6241)
- Series.apply_fn(func) (line 6885)
- Series.combine has DataFrame counterpart at 21023

Scope:
- Extend an existing test with the most user-facing 4-5 calls.

Files: crates/frankenpandas/tests/readme_quick_example.rs.

All 36 integration tests + 7 lib tests + 2 doctests pass.","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0}

 {"id":"frankenpandas-jj8w","title":"pandas: DataFrame.pivot_table median/std/var aggfunc parity","description":"py signature:
df.pivot_table(values="v", index="i", columns="c", aggfunc="median")
df.pivot_table(values="v", index="i", columns="c", aggfunc="std")
df.pivot_table(values="v", index="i", columns="c", aggfunc="var")

Current fp-frame pivot_table_with_dropna in crates/fp-frame/src/lib.rs only accepts sum/mean/count/min/max/first. Add the common pandas numeric aggfuncs median/std/var with null-handling and focused parity tests.","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-04-21T16:56:14.409738624Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-04-21T17:25:25.267214387Z","closed_at":"2026-04-21T17:25:25.265351301Z","close_reason":"Completed","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0}
